candidates.title: Modern Casual Dress Logo
candidates.tools: Photoshop · Illustrator — for print-ready CMYK output and scalable vector artwork
candidates.brief: My new casual-dress label needs a crisp, modern logo that captures an easy-going yet stylish vibe. Style • Overall look: clean, contemporary lines with just enough personality to feel approachable rather than high-fashion formal. • Colour choices are open, though a palette that feels fresh and wearable (think muted pastels or a single bold accent) will probably suit the brand best. Feel free to propose options. Concept guidance A subtle dress silhouette, smart negative space, or expressive lettering could all work—as long as the result remains unmistakably modern and instantly readable at small sizes (web favicons, garment labels, swing tags). I’m flexible on icon vs. typography so long as the final mark feels balanced and scales well. Deliverables 1. Primary logo in fully editable vector format (.ai or .eps) 2. High-resolution transparent PNG (RGB) 3. One-colour and reverse variants 4.

candidates.title: Luxury E-commerce Brand Visuals
candidates.tools: Photoshop · Illustrator — for scalable vector artwork and layered/retouched assets
candidates.brief: I’m creating a high-end brand that unites graphic design, videography, photography and a streamlined e-commerce website. The entire identity must feel unmistakably premium: think a deep black canvas paired with crisp white typography, minimal ornamentation, and a confident, modern layout. Logo & Core Identity The logo has to rely purely on typography—no symbols, icons or complex marks. Clean letterforms, balanced kerning and a subtle nod to luxury brands such as Saint Laurent or Balenciaga are key. Alongside the primary lock-up, I’ll need a monochrome palette, font recommendations and usage rules so every asset—from product packaging to video title cards—stays consistent. E-commerce Experience The site’s main job is selling. It should showcase products elegantly while highlighting verified customer reviews (this is the one essential feature I specified). candidates.title: Modern DTF T-Shirt Design
candidates.tools: Photoshop · Illustrator — for print-ready CMYK output and scalable vector artwork
candidates.brief: The job is straightforward: craft a fresh, modern t-shirt artwork that fuses engaging text with complementary graphic elements, ready for direct-to-film (DTF) printing. I will provide the concept wording and any brand guidelines once we start. Your task is to translate that concept into a visually balanced layout, sized for a standard adult tee, at 300 DPI on a transparent background. Please keep colours print-friendly and layer your file so tweaks to typography or palette remain simple. Deliverables • Print-ready PNG (transparent, 300 DPI, 12×16 in or larger) • Layered source file (AI, PSD or editable vector) • Mock-up on a plain tee for quick review Acceptance criteria • Clearly modern aesthetic—clean lines, contemporary fonts, well-integrated illustration • Text and graphics work together; neither feels like an afterthought • No jagged edges or stray pixels when zoomed to 100% To move

candidates.title: Fashion sketching - 03/06/2026 12:11 EDT
candidates.tools: Photoshop · Illustrator · InDesign — for scalable vector artwork and layered/retouched assets
candidates.brief: I’m building a fresh set of visuals for an upcoming campaign and need clean, minimalist sketches that instantly feel at home on ads, social posts, and printed collateral. The look I’m after is stripped-down line work paired with bold, abstract shapes—no shading, no busy detail—just the essentials that let copy and brand colors shine. You’ll translate my short creative brief (mood board, key messages, and a rough layout guide) into polished artwork I can drop straight into InDesign, Canva, or web templates. Illustration software such as Adobe Illustrator, Procreate, or even hand-drawn scans cleaned up in Photoshop works for me; what matters is a crisp, high-resolution result that scales without losing sharpness. Deliverables • A set of minimalist sketches incorporating abstract shapes (exported as layered AI, SVG, and high-res PNG) • Source files neatly organized and labeled for easy colo

candidates.title: Modern Minimalistic Fashion Logo Design
candidates.tools: Photoshop · Illustrator — for scalable vector artwork and layered/retouched assets
candidates.brief: I run a fashion-focused brand and I’m ready to elevate its visual identity with a fresh, modern logo. I’m drawn to a clean, minimalistic aesthetic in a monochrome palette—think sleek lines, elegant negative space, and no unnecessary embellishments. The design must be 100 % original and evoke both style and confidence while remaining instantly recognisable at any size, from clothing labels to large storefront signage. Please develop at least two distinct concept directions so I can choose the one that best captures my brand personality. Once a concept is approved, refine it through a few rounds of feedback to nail down every detail.
